message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.shares_memory passthrough wrapper (br-franken_numpy-6uqd)

Expose fnp_python.shares_memory delegating to numpy.shares_memory(a, b, /, max_work=-1).
Parity oracle test covers:
- self vs self (True)
- overlapping slice views (exact solver confirms overlap)
- even/odd strided views on same buffer (exact solver reports no overlap)
- flatten() copy vs source (no sharing)
- independent arange arrays (no sharing)
- max_work=0 heuristic surface parity (success-or-error agreement)
- python-list argument surface parity
